Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPVLL ;;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform TCP Spawn ; 5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ;Per VHA directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. Q ; ; SPAWN ; -- spawned process N X,DVPSTOP,DVPPORT,DVPHDLR,DVPLASTR,DVPCMREF ; S DVPSTOP=0 S DVPPORT=$S($G(DVPPORT):DVPPORT,1:IO) S U="^" ; ; -- initialize timestamp for last time request made (used for debugging) S DVPLASTR=0 ; ; -- set error trap ;Set up the error trap ;S $ET="DO ^%ZTER HALT" ; ; -- attempt to share the license; must have TCP port open first ;U DVPPORT I $T(SHARELIC^%ZOSV)'="" D SHARELIC^%ZOSV(1) ; ; -- start RUM for VistALink Handler ;D LOGRSRC^%ZOSV("$VISTALINK HANDLER$",2,1) ; ; -- cache/initialize startup request handlers ;S X=$$CACHE^XOBVRH(.XOBHDLR) ;I 'X D RMERR^XOBVRM(184001,$P(X,U,2)) Q ; ; -- initialize tcp processing variables D INIT^DVPSKT ; ; -- change job name if possible D SETNM^%ZOSV("DVPtcp_"_$$CNV^XLFUTL($J,16)) ; ; -- setup for Connection Mgr: get ref; kill data @ ref ;S XOBCMREF=$$GETREF^XOBUZAP1() ;D KILL^XOBUZAP0(XOBCMREF) ; ; -- loop until told to stop F D NXTCALL Q:DVPSTOP ; ; -- kill ^XTMP ref node ;D KILL^XOBUZAP0(XOBCMREF) ; ; -- final/clean tcp processing variables D FINAL^DVPSKT ; ; -- stop RUM for VistALink Handler ;D LOGRSRC^%ZOSV("$VISTALINK HANDLER$",2,2) ; Q ; NXTCALL ; -- do next call N X,DVPROOT,DVPREAD,DVPTO,DVPFIRST,DVPOK,DVPRL,DVPDATA,DVPRM ; ; -- setup environment variables S DT=$$DT^XLFDT(),DVPTO=36000,DVPFIRST=1 ;p63 ; -- set up error trap N $ES S $ET="DO SYSERR^DVPVLL" ; ; -- setup environment variables N DIQUIET S DIQUIET=1 S U="^",DTIME=$G(DTIME,900),DT=$$DT^XLFDT() ; ; -- initialize 'current' request handler to empty string S DVPHDLR="" ; ; -- # of chars to get on first read / read 11 for Broker initial read S DVPREAD=34 ; ; -- set first read flag S DVPFIRST=1 ; ; -- setup intake global S DVPROOT=$NA(^TMP("DVP-MSG",$J)) K @DVPROOT ; ; -- read from socket port U DVPPORT ;S DVPOK=$$READ^DVPRL(DVPROOT,.DVPREAD,.DVPTO,.DVPFIRST,.DVPSTOP) S DVPOK=$$READ^DVPSKT(DVPROOT,.DVPREAD,.DVPTO,.DVPFIRST,.DVPSTOP,.DVPDATA,.DVPHDLR) ; ; -- timed out ; cleanup user and exit I 'DVPOK!(DVPSTOP) D G NXTCALLQ . I $G(DUZ) D CLEAN^XOBSCAV1 . S DVPSTOP=1 ; ; -- need null device ;I '$D(DVPNULL) D ERROR(181002,$$EZBLD^DIALOG(181002),DVPPORT) S DVPSTOP=1 G NXTCALLQ ; ; -- call request manager S DVPRM=$$EN^DVPMSG1(.DVPR,.DVPROOT) S DVPSTOP=1 ; -- timestamp last time request made S DVPLASTR=$$NOW^XLFDT() ; -- cleanup intake global ;K @DVPROOT ; NXTCALLQ ; -- exit Q ; ; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ; System Error Handler ; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- SYSERR ; -- send system error message ; -- If we get an error in the error handler just Halt ;S $ET="D ^%ZTER HALT" ; I $G(DVPPORT)="" S DVPPORT=IO ; N DVPRET,DVPRET S DVPRET=$NA(^TMP("DVP_TARGET",$J)) D ERR^DVPERR(.DVPRET) D . D SEND^DVPMSG1(.DVPRET) . D POST^DVPSKT Q ; KILL ; -- new variables and then do big KILL N DVPPORT,DVPSTOP,DVPNULL,DVPOS,DVPSYS,DVPHDLR,DVPOK,DVPLASTR,DVPCMREF D KILL^XUSCLEAN Q
